title: How Are We Still Hearing from Voyager 1?
description:
Voyager 1 is the most distant human-made object ever launched. At 14.5 billion miles from Earth, it's still sending back signals. But what has it discovered? And what secrets from the edge of the solar system does it hold?

▸ A 47-year mission to the farthest reaches of our solar system
▸ The Golden Record: humanity's voice sent to the cosmos
▸ How scientists still listen to whispers from the darkness
▸ What one machine has revealed about our place in the universe

New astronomy documentaries every week. Subscribe and hit the bell 🔔
